sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_pseudo_id) AS n_users
FROM `bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201101`
WHERE DATE(event_timestamp / 1e6) BETWEEN '20210101' AND '20210107'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM UNNEST(event_params) AS p
  WHERE p.key = 'session_engaged' AND p.value.int_value > 0
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201101` AS prev_events
  WHERE prev_events.user_pseudo_id = events_20201101.user_pseudo_id
  AND DATE(prev_events.event_timestamp / 1e6) BETWEEN '20210106' AND '20210107'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(prev_events.event_params) AS p
    WHERE p.key = 'session_engaged' AND p.value.int_value > 0
  )
)
error_message:
400 POST https://bigquery.googleapis.com/bigquery/v2/projects/project-0e0fc8a5-27b1-4e00-912/jobs?prettyPrint=false: No matching signature for function DATE
  Argument types: FLOAT64
  Signature: DATE(TIMESTAMP, [STRING])
    Argument 1: Unable to coerce type FLOAT64 to expected type TIMESTAMP
  Sig
